nasb.text: and they did not repent of their murders nor of their sorceries nor of their immorality nor of their thefts.

esv.text: nor did they repent of their murders or their sorceries or their sexual immorality or their thefts.

cnv.text: 他們也不為自己的兇殺、邪術、淫亂和偷盜悔改。

ccb.text: 他们不肯为自己所犯的凶杀、邪术、淫乱和偷盗悔改。

csbs.text: 他们也不悔改离开自己那些杀人、邪术、淫乱、偷窃之事。
